original: This peculiar suit made to look like a naga’s lower body is actually a deceptively advanced piece of experimental technology. By putting it on and activating it via the switch on the belt buckle, one can instantly grow a hardlight, naga body from the projectors based on the suit’s backside that feels like the real thing.
context: <<POS:05580086>> e.tooltip='This peculiar suit made to look like a naga’s lower body is '

original: You put your naked [pc.legsNoun] inside the suit, shivering as you touch the red jelly. Knowing it’s best to get it over with quickly, you pull the baggy-suit up and close the belt before pressing the button on its buckle. The suit swiftly comes to life, the hardlight projectors on the back making the rest of a naga body sprout from nothing behind you. At the same time, you lose all sensation from your lower body as the suit rewrites your senses with its own. You brace yourself against the nausea caused by the sudden transformation of your limbs and the change in balance it brings, but find that the ordeal is soon over. You look behind you with satisfaction, admiring the scale-covered body of a naga slithering there. You pat your body, noting with satisfaction that your hand touched what felt like a real naleen body and that your own flank felt your hand’s touch as well. You also feel your [pc.crotch] back there, where it belongs. At least, a hardlight copy that rests on your waist where it belongs. You’re a naga now! ...unless you take off the suit.
translation: 你把你赤裸的[pc.legsNoun]伸进套装里，碰到红色凝胶时不禁打了个寒颤。你知道最好速战速决，于是把这件宽松的套装穿起，扣好腰带，然后按下了带扣上的按钮。 套装迅速启动，背部的硬光投影仪让你身后凭空长出了娜迦身体的其余部分。与此同时，你的下半身失去了所有知觉，因为套装用它自己的感官重写了你的感官。你强忍着四肢突然变形和随之而来的平衡改变所引起的恶心感，但发现这种折磨很快就结束了。 你满意地向后看去，欣赏着那具布满鳞片的娜迦身体在身后滑动。你拍了拍自己的身体，满意地注意到你的手摸起来就像是真正的纳林人身体，而且你自己的侧腹也能感觉到手的触摸。你还能感觉到你的[pc.crotch]就在后面，在它该在的地方。至少，是一个停留在你腰部它该在的地方的硬光复制品。 你现在是个娜迦了！……除非你脱下这件套装。
context: <<POS:05582657>> textify(['You put your naked [pc.legsNoun] inside the suit, '...])

original: You press the button on your belt buckle and brace yourself. Your naga body starts slowly losing its opacity at the same rate as you lose sensation in it. Soon enough, your entire hardlight body is gone, the loss of sensation giving you a nauseating feeling which you cannot focus on as you already have to deal with a drastically different center of gravity.\n\n\t\tOnce you recover, you take a deep breath and pull the suit’s bag-like brim down, freeing your regular
translation: 你按下皮带扣上的按钮，稳住身体。你的娜迦身体开始慢慢变得透明，与此同时你对它的知觉也在以相同的速度消失。很快，你整个硬光身体完全消失了，知觉的丧失让你感到一阵恶心，但你无暇顾及，因为你必须去应对截然不同的重心。\n\n\t\t等你缓过神来，你深吸一口气，将服装那袋状的边缘向下拉，释放出你原本的
context: <<POS:05583993>> textify(['You press the button on your belt buckle and brace'...])

original: . You shiver as you feel them properly once more and stow the suit away.\n\n\t\tYou’re no longer a naga!
translation: 。当你再次真切地感受到它们时，你不禁打了个寒颤，并将这套服装收了起来。\n\n\t\t你不再是娜迦了！
context: <<POS:05584465>> textify(['. You shiver as you feel them properly once more a'...])
